questions.question: Which of these cartoons had a character named Heinz Doofenshmirtz?
In the 1993 Disney animated series "Bonkers", what is the name of Bonker's second partner?
Butters Stotch, Pip Pirrup, and Wendy Testaburger are all characters in which long running animated TV series?
What was the number on Gerald's shirt in "Hey Arnold!"?
Who voiced Finn in Adventure Time?
Who played Stan's dog in the South Park episode "Big Gay Al's Big Gay Boat Ride"?
Which animated series, premiering in 1992, follows the adventures of a young street rat who discovers a magical lamp?
questions.explanation: Premiering in 1992, 'Aladdin' was a television series that continued the story from Disney's hit movie of the same name. It featured Aladdin, a street-smart young man, and his adventures with the magical Genie, capturing the spirit of 1990s animation and storytelling.

questions.question: In 'Finding Nemo', what is the hidden detail that references Pixar's first feature film, 'Toy Story'?
questions.explanation: In 'Finding Nemo', a Buzz Lightyear toy can be seen in the waiting room of the dentist's office. This is a nod to 'Toy Story', Pixar's first feature film, and is one of many Easter eggs that Pixar includes in its films, connecting them through subtle references.
